case_title: ANGELICA GOMEZ VS. GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, ANGELICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, GABINO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP TORRES, MARIA INDIVIDUALLY AND A GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $1,599.49 PRINCIPAL, $5.98 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,830.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, ANGELICA AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, GABINO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP TORRES, MARIA INDIVIDUALLY AND A GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
